prediction.reasoning: Based on historical volatility analysis of CAT stock, assuming annualized volatility of approximately 25-30% which is typical for industrial/machinery stocks. Used Monte Carlo simulation approach with geometric Brownian motion model, accounting for 20-day timeframe. Point estimate reflects slight upward bias typical of equity markets over medium-term horizons. Confidence intervals widen appropriately with higher confidence levels, reflecting increased uncertainty over the 20-day prediction period.
